creator: george@m5p.com
text:
Can't delete an inet6 alias address from an interface

Fix: Apply following patch, recompile, and install:


How-To-Repeat: 	ifconfig re0 inet6 alias 2001:418:3fd::66
	ifconfig re0 inet6 delete 2001:418:3fd::66
	"ifconfig: ioctl (SIOCDIFADDR): Can't assign requested address"
